column1: # Sweep — Matrix LR fine scan (2026-04-23, v2 — includes 0.040 historical peak)
# PURPOSE: fill in the MATRIX_LR curve between arbiter's probes AND re-test the
#   - Spark sweep_26 (2000 iters): 0.042 REGRESSED vs 0.040-anchored baseline
#   - s28 single-shot at 0.042 = 1.3729 was an OUTLIER (s32 N=3 mean = 1.4262)
# Arbiter gives N=3 at MLR=0.022 (arm C) and MLR=0.042 (arm A).
# CRITICAL: 0.040 is listed FIRST so we probe the historical peak before
# anything else; if the arbiter ships before this completes, we still have data.
# Fit a parabola (or just argmin) → pick the optimum LR with ~2-seed confidence
# across the whole curve. Decision: lock MATRIX_LR = argmin(mean_bpb).
# Identical QK/WARMDOWN/TTT/EMA/SOFTCAP to arbiter so rows are directly comparable.
# Same seeds {42, 314} used so we can do paired-seed comparisons.
# --- MLR = 0.040 (HISTORICAL PEAK — re-test first, prior N=1 at 2000 iters) ---

column2: QK_GAIN_INIT=5.5 WARMDOWN_FRAC=0.64 TTT_ENABLED=1 SLIDING_WINDOW_ENABLED=1 TTT_EPOCHS=1 EMA_DECAY=0.995 LOGIT_SOFTCAP=20 MATRIX_LR=0.040 ITERATIONS=2000 MAX_WALLCLOCK_SECONDS=3600 TIMEOUT_SECS=5400 FAST_SMOKE=0 SEED=42 NOTES=mlr_fine_040_historical_peak
